nasb.text: Then he commanded also the second and the third, and all those who followed the droves, saying, “After this manner you shall speak to Esau when you find him;

esv.text: He likewise instructed the second and the third and all who followed the droves, “You shall say the same thing to Esau when you find him,

cnv.text: 他又吩咐第二個、第三個和所有跟在隊伍後面的人說：“你們遇見以掃的時候，都要這樣對他說。

ccb.text: 雅各又吩咐看管第二群、第三群及其余牲畜的仆人遇见以扫时也要这样回答，

csbs.text: 他又吩咐第二个、第三个和所有跟在各群后面的仆人说：“你们遇见以扫的时候，也要这样对他说，
